note: One governed corrective transition. Hard constraints filter admissibility BEFORE ranking; delta is a control-state change (not correctness); reread is performed; runtime closure is not human restoration; strict soundness is not claimed.

transitions.state_before: IR with a live criterion-import burden and one residual dependency
transitions.ranking_witness: governance partial-order over admissible routes: disclosure-first, then reversibility; NOT a differential gradient
transitions.executor_operation: issue a criterion-clarification operator bound to mubar-case-1
transitions.delta: control-state change: the criterion-import burden moves from live to addressed; the residual dependency stays live
transitions.state_after: IR with the criterion-import burden addressed; one dependency still live
transitions.field_diagnostics: route admissible; disclosure improved; one dependency unresolved

reread.outcome: reread finds the residual dependency still live; closure withheld

non_claims: delta is a runtime control-state change, not result correctness
an admissible, pathway-adequate transition is not strictly sound; strict soundness is a factive claim-relative predicate (Decision 0011)
runtime closure would not be human restoration; no soul-state is asserted
no burden was deleted or concealed to simulate progress
